title: Nursery Rhyme. CXLIV. Songs.
content:
Jeanie come tie my,
        Jeanie come tie my,
        Jeanie come tie my bonnie cravat;
        I've tied it behind,
        I've tied it before,
        And I've tied it so often, I'll tie it no more.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXLIV. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
